name: Construction Partners, Inc.
business: Construction Partners, Inc. is a civil infrastructure company specializing in the construction and maintenance of roadways, including highways, roads, bridges, and airports. It provides hot mix asphalt manufacturing and paving, site development, aggregate mining, and liquid asphalt cement distribution. The company serves public and private customers across the Sunbelt states.
sellsTo: Public infrastructure projects (federal, state, and local agencies)

exposures.sentence: We are a civil infrastructure company that specializes in the construction and maintenance of roadways across Alabama, Florida, Georgia, North Carolina, Oklahoma, South Carolina, Tennessee and Texas.
Our primary operations consist of... (iv) mining aggregates, such as sand, gravel and construction stone, that are used as raw materials in the production of HMA and for sales to third parties.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of eight HMA plants in Houston and P&S Paving in Florida
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we acquired eight HMA plants and related crews and equipment in the Houston, Texas metro area from affiliates of Vulcan Materials Company, and acquired all of the outstanding equity interests of P&S Paving, LLC, an HMA manufacturing and construction business headquartered in Daytona Beach, Florida, with two HMA plants serving northeast and central Florida.
